description.value:
Old court annotations kept under seal — the oldest Svellspraak court records contain marginal annotations in a cipher that names every signatory's true circumstances; an implement carrying these annotations can extend that knowing outward, letting the wielder find what wishes to remain hidden.

Effect: Once per respite, name a creature you can see. Until your next respite, you gain an edge on all tests made to track, locate, or find information about that creature.

Rules: Edge; Tests; Respite.

project.prerequisites: An implement of exceptional quality; a page from an old Svellspraak court record with intact marginal cipher-annotations
project.source: Old court annotations kept under seal (Svellspraak)
